description_long: A young adult woman stands with arms slightly outstretched, wearing a sleeveless fitted top and a high-waisted, flared mini skirt. She has knee-high socks with a subtle pattern and wears heeled shoes. Her accessories include multiple bracelets on both wrists and a headband. Her hairstyle is a shoulder-length, softly layered bob with gentle waves. The figure's facial features are stylized, and her overall appearance suggests a fashionable, casual urban style.
description: A fashionable young woman in a sleeveless top, flared mini skirt, knee-high socks, and heeled shoes, accessorized with bracelets and a headband.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sleeveless top, flared skirt, knee-high socks, heeled shoes, bracelets, and headband.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the skirt, arm, and layered hairstyle.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the top, skirt, hairstyle, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the skirt, arm, and hairstyle from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top, high-waisted flared mini skirt, knee-high socks, heeled shoes, bracelets, headband
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: shoulder-length softly layered bob with gentle waves
